name: store-release-kit
description: GitOps-style App Store release metadata and localization toolkit.

scripts.smoke:example: pnpm build && cd examples/simple-ios-app && node ../../packages/cli/dist/index.js validate --version 2.4.0 --strict && node ../../packages/cli/dist/index.js export --version 2.4.0 --format fastlane && node ../../packages/cli/dist/index.js push --version 2.4.0 --provider mock --dry-run
